questions.text: Which poster would best show "Practice = Memory"?

options.text: Poster showing daily practice and repetition 🔁
Poster showing someone sleeping all day 😴

questions.text: Which poster would best show "Repeat to Remember"?

options.text: Poster showing repeated learning and practice 🔁

questions.text: Which poster would best show "Memory Gets Stronger with Practice"?

options.text: Poster showing no practice at all 🚫
Poster showing daily practice and improvement 📈

questions.text: Which poster would best show "Review Helps Memory"?
Which poster would best show "Strong Memory Through Repetition"?

options.text: Poster showing repeated practice and learning 🔁
Poster showing someone learning once and stopping ⏸️
Poster showing someone avoiding all learning 🚫
